greatech.configuration.title: Greatech Configs
greatech.configuration.converterMaxOutpu: Maximum EU generated each tick after all conversion calculations.
greatech.configuration.converterOutputVo: GTCEu output voltage for each packet sent to adjacent machines.
greatech.configuration.converterOutputAm: Maximum packets sent per tick. Voltage x amperage limits export throughput.
greatech.configuration.converterEfficien: EU generated per 1 RPM of Create rotation before the max output cap is applied.
greatech.configuration.converterStressIm: Stress impact added to the Create kinetic network by this machine.
greatech.configuration.converterMinimumS: Minimum absolute RPM required before the machine starts generating EU.
message.greatech.su_energy_converter.sta: Speed: %s rpm | Stored: %s EU | Generated: %s EU/t
